name: secrets-safety
description: Prevent exposure and mishandling of secrets — env files, vault, 1password, and printenv
author: sieteunoseis

hooks.name: Block cat/echo on secret files
hooks.description: Prevents reading .env, .pem, .key, and credential files to stdout

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^(cat|less|more|head|tail|bat) .*\.(env|pem|key|p12|pfx|jks)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: reading a file that likely contains secrets. Use a secrets manager or get explicit approval."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block printenv and env dump
hooks.description: Prevents printenv and env commands which dump all environment variables including secrets

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^(printenv|env)$'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: dumping all environment variables can expose secrets. Query specific variables instead."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block vault write and delete
hooks.description: Prevents HashiCorp Vault write, delete, and destroy operations

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^vault (write|delete|destroy|kv (put|delete|destroy)) '; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: vault write/delete modifies secrets storage. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block 1Password write operations
hooks.description: Prevents op item create, edit, delete, and vault operations in 1Password CLI

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^op (item (create|edit|delete)|vault (create|delete)|document (create|edit|delete)) '; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: 1Password write operation. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }
